nasb.text: Do not eat any of it raw or boiled at all with water, but rather roasted with fire, both its head and its legs along with its entrails.

esv.text: Do not eat any of it raw or boiled in water, but roasted, its head with its legs and its inner parts.

cnv.text: 不可吃生的，也不可用水煮；只可吃用火烤的。頭、腿和內臟都一起吃。

ccb.text: 不可吃生羊肉，也不可煮着吃，要把整只羊，连头带腿和内脏一并烤着吃。
